what_it_does: Raw research ledger for workflow wf_c199b8c6 (2026-06-10) that documents four lanes of findings—facets, retrieval, canvas, handoff—about the company's code/design substrates, citing file:line evidence and deriving implications for building a forager/whittle-search canvas.
observations: The corpus has 2067 deduped records across 2080 events, with vectors only in repo (644) and history (1420); topics, principles, and worldview are declared but have zero records/vectors.

Only project, projection/lens, record_kind, source_address, capture-ts, session, and round are facetable from the index row; source time, pattern_tag, topic, and principle facets require reading CAS content or capture runs.
Suite.query_corpus exists but is not exposed over HTTP; the MCP corpus tool already supports query/list/find/read and detailed hit enrichment.
find_relations is implemented and exposed on both HTTP and MCP, but fail-louds because the principles space is unpopulated.

The canvas runs tldraw 3.15.6; a second forager circle shape can be added as a sibling file with Circle2d geometry, and existing consumers are already type-fenced so no existing loader/edges/inspector code needs edits.
Generalizing the builder-panel context from one address to a selection set needs only a bridge-side block-builder change; run_turn already accepts an opaque context_block string per turn.
Current context folding truncates each help leg to 600 chars and omits blast_radius; the prompt is a single argv argument with a hard ~128 KiB ceiling.

Several gaps are explicitly called out: no count/aggregate API, no HTTP semantic-query route, ts_source dropped by the current miner, /api/corpus is a mockup name collision, and circles will persist across reloads unless pruned.
standouts: The single missing HTTP seam for whittle search is a query route delegating to Suite.query_corpus; everything else is already wired.
Three declared embeddable spaces (topics, principles, worldview) are empty, and the inversion-finder find_relations is built but cannot run until principles is populated.
A forager circle shape drops in with minimal surface because every existing shape consumer filters by type === 'node'.
Multi-address context handoff is almost entirely a bridge-side generalization; the session layer and frontend stream loop need no change.
conventions: Uses WHERE/DETAIL/IMPLICATION structure with file:line citations.
Labels evidence as Observed or Inferred and avoids claiming runtime behavior for unexecuted paths.
Follows a fail-loud design: lineage gate, missing-vector raises, honest empty notes, no silent truncation.
Honors bounded per-item context budgets (600 chars/leg) and persistence-key bump discipline on schema changes.
Treats MCP tool semantics as the reference contract for HTTP routes.
concerns: find_corpus performs a full event-log scan on every call with no Suite-level limit or paging.
query_corpus degrades to empty when the embedder is down instead of ensuring residency first.
The /api/corpus mockup route collides conceptually with /api/cognition/corpus.
space=None in query_index ranks only the 78-entry legacy default index, not the corpus spaces.
ts_source is dropped by the current miner and exists in only 173 history records, so time-period faceting requires a backfill.
Forager circles will persist in IndexedDB across reloads unless the feature actively prunes them.
notes: A dense, evidence-anchored audit of what is real, empty, and missing across the corpus, retrieval, canvas, and handoff substrates, with precise minimal-change integration paths.
questions: Was this file produced by an automated research pass or manually authored?
Which of the recommended capture runs (topics, principles, coined_vocab) and backfills (ts_source) are already scheduled?
Has the proposed HTTP /api/cognition/query route or the persistence-key v3→v4 bump been implemented?
What is the intended priority order among the four lanes for the next build step?
purpose_vs_actual: The title and header state it is raw forager research lane findings; the content matches that purpose exactly.
apparent_themes: Honest surfacing of gaps and empty spaces rather than silent degradation.
Bounded operator context and no-silent-failure batching.
intention_signals: It is trying to give a builder a complete, evidence-based map of the current substrate so a forager/whittle-search canvas and multi-address handoff can be implemented with the smallest possible changes, while flagging which empty spaces need capture runs.
novelty: It is a self-aware research artifact with explicit Observed/Inferred status, WHERE/DETAIL/IMPLICATION structure, and a substrate-audit framing rather than a task list or design doc.
contribution: It contributes a structured inventory of live versus missing substrate pieces—corpus facet coverage, retrieval seams, canvas shape coexistence patterns, and handoff context mechanics—plus precise file:line references and minimal integration paths that a fused system can keep as ground-truth for implementation planning.
summary_for_embedding: Raw four-lane research findings for workflow wf_c199b8c6 mapping the company's corpus facet coverage, retrieval seams, tldraw canvas custom-shape coexistence patterns, and builder-panel context-handoff mechanics with file:line evidence and gap implications.
intention_for_embedding: Produced to inform the design and implementation of a forager/whittle-search canvas and multi-address operator context by pinpointing live substrates, empty spaces, and minimal integration points.
